headline: AVO's International Farming Bounces Back: Can It Stay Consistent?
summary: Mission Produce's international farming rebounds with stronger yields and higher volumes after past weather disruptions.

headline: Corteva to Webcast Investor Days for Two New Companies
summary: Corteva (NYSE: CTVA) announced today that on Tuesday, September 15, 2026, the company will host a live video webcast of its Investor Day, which will be divided into two parts: at 9:00 AM EDT, the company will introduce its seed and genetics business as a future standalone, public company ("SpinCo"). At 1:00 PM. EDT, New Corteva will introduce its future vision after the intended separation of SpinCo. Both Investor Days will include management presentations and a Q&A session.
